tasks.subject: background-task-visibility [P1] Add stopTask to AgentRuntime and Transport interfaces
tasks.description:
Add the `stopTask` method to both the `AgentRuntime` interface (server-side) and the `Transport` interface (client-side) to support killing background tasks.

## Implementation

### 1. Update `packages/shared/src/agent-runtime.ts`

Add `stopTask` to the `AgentRuntime` interface in the `// --- Messaging ---` section, after `sendMessage`:

```typescript
  /**
   * Stop a running background task (subagent or bash command).
   *
   * @param sessionId - The parent session containing the task
   * @param taskId - The background task to stop
   * @returns true if the stop was initiated, false if the task was not found or already stopped
   */
  stopTask(sessionId: string, taskId: string): Promise<boolean>;
```

This is a required method (not optional) because all runtimes should support stopping tasks. If a runtime doesn't support it, it should return `false`.

### 2. Update `packages/shared/src/transport.ts`

Add `stopTask` to the `Transport` interface, after the existing `submitAnswers` method:

```typescript
  /**
   * Stop a running background task.
   *
   * @param sessionId - The parent session containing the task
   * @param taskId - The background task to stop
   * @returns Result indicating success or failure
   */
  stopTask(
    sessionId: string,
    taskId: string
  ): Promise<{ success: boolean; taskId: string }>;
```

### 3. Verify compilation

Run `pnpm typecheck` on the shared package. Downstream packages (server, client) will fail until they implement the new method — this is expected and will be addressed in Phase 2 and Phase 3.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `AgentRuntime.stopTask(sessionId, taskId)` exists and returns `Promise<boolean>`
- `Transport.stopTask(sessionId, taskId)` exists and returns `Promise<{ success: boolean; taskId: string }>`
- Both have complete TSDoc comments
- The shared package itself typechecks
tasks.activeForm: Adding stopTask to AgentRuntime and Transport interfaces

tasks.subject: background-task-visibility [P5] Delete old files and clean up all remaining SubagentPart references
tasks.description:
Delete the replaced files, update all remaining imports, and ensure no stale references to the old subagent types exist anywhere in the codebase.

## Implementation

### 1. Delete old files

- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/RunningAgentIndicator.tsx` — replaced by `BackgroundTaskBar.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/use-running-subagents.ts` — replaced by `use-background-tasks.ts`

### 2. Search and replace remaining references

Run a codebase-wide search for:
- `SubagentPart` — should have zero results
- `SubagentStartedEvent` — should have zero results
- `SubagentProgressEvent` — should have zero results
- `SubagentDoneEvent` — should have zero results
- `SubagentStatus` — should have zero results
- `subagent_started` — should have zero results (except in backward-compat history mapper)
- `subagent_progress` — should have zero results
- `subagent_done` — should have zero results
- `RunningAgentIndicator` — should have zero results
- `useRunningSubagents` — should have zero results
- `RunningAgent` (the type) — should have zero results (note: `AgentRunner` component is kept)
- `findSubagentPart` — should have zero results

Files that commonly reference these and need updating:
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/index.ts` (barrel exports)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/ChatStatusSection.tsx` (if it references subagent types)
- `apps/client/src/dev/showcases/ToolShowcases.tsx` (dev playground may reference SubagentPart)
- `apps/client/src/dev/sections/chat-sections.ts` (dev playground sections)
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/primitives/CollapsibleCard.tsx` (may reference SubagentBlock)
- Test files (handled in Phase 6)

### 3. Update barrel exports

In `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/index.ts`, update exports:
```typescript
// Remove:
export { useRunningSubagents, type RunningAgent } from './model/use-running-subagents';
export { RunningAgentIndicator } from './ui/RunningAgentIndicator';

// Add:
export { useBackgroundTasks, type VisibleTask } from './model/use-background-tasks';
export { BackgroundTaskBar } from './ui/BackgroundTaskBar';
```

### 4. Full typecheck

Run `pnpm typecheck` across the entire monorepo. Fix any remaining type errors.

### 5. Full lint

Run `pnpm lint` to catch unused imports and other issues.

## Acceptance Criteria
- `RunningAgentIndicator.tsx` and `use-running-subagents.ts` are deleted from the filesystem
- `pnpm typecheck` passes across all packages
- `pnpm lint` passes across all packages
- Zero codebase references to: `SubagentPart`, `SubagentStartedEvent`, `SubagentProgressEvent`, `SubagentDoneEvent`, `SubagentStatus`, `RunningAgentIndicator`, `useRunningSubagents`, `RunningAgent` (type), `findSubagentPart`
- The only acceptable reference to `subagent` string literals is in the backward-compatibility migration code in `stream-history-helpers.ts`
- Barrel exports are updated to export the new types and components
tasks.activeForm: Deleting old files and cleaning up SubagentPart references

tasks.subject: background-task-visibility [P6] Migrate RunningAgentIndicator and useRunningSubagents tests
tasks.description:
Migrate the existing test files to test the new components and hooks. Rename and update test assertions for the new data model.

## Implementation

### 1. Migrate `RunningAgentIndicator.test.tsx` -> `BackgroundTaskBar.test.tsx`

Create `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/__tests__/BackgroundTaskBar.test.tsx`.

Update the test structure:
- Import `BackgroundTaskBar` instead of `RunningAgentIndicator`
- Import `VisibleTask` instead of `RunningAgent`
- Update mock data to include `taskType`, `startedAt`, and optional `command` fields
- Update assertions for the new label format ("N tasks running" instead of "N agents running")
- Add test cases for mixed agent + bash tasks
- Add test case for the expand toggle

Example mock data:
```typescript
const mockAgentTask: VisibleTask = {
  taskId: 'task-1',
  taskType: 'agent',
  description: 'Explore codebase',
  status: 'running',
  color: 'hsl(210 80% 60%)',
  startedAt: Date.now() - 10000,
  toolUses: 5,
  lastToolName: 'Read',
  durationMs: 10000,
};

const mockBashTask: VisibleTask = {
  taskId: 'task-2',
  taskType: 'bash',
  command: 'npm run dev',
  status: 'running',
  color: 'hsl(150 60% 50%)',
  startedAt: Date.now() - 8000,
  durationMs: 8000,
};
```

Test cases to include:
- Renders nothing when tasks array is empty
- Renders agent runner figures for agent tasks
- Renders bash dot section for bash tasks
- Shows separator when both types present
- Shows correct task count label
- Shows expand/collapse toggle
- Toggles expanded state on click
- Passes onStopTask callback through

### 2. Migrate `use-running-subagents.test.ts` -> `use-background-tasks.test.ts`

Create `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-background-tasks.test.ts`.

Update the test structure:
- Import `useBackgroundTasks` and `VisibleTask`
- Update mock message parts to use `type: 'background_task'` with `taskType` and `startedAt`
- Keep existing tests for: color assignment stability, celebration window, status transitions
- Add new test cases for:
  - Bash tasks below 5s threshold are filtered out
  - Bash tasks above 5s threshold appear
  - Agent tasks appear immediately regardless of startedAt
  - The `'stopped'` status triggers celebration window
  - Timer-based re-evaluation (use `vi.advanceTimersByTime`)

Example test for bash threshold:
```typescript
it('filters bash tasks below 5-second threshold', () => {
  vi.useFakeTimers();
  const now = Date.now();
  const messages = [createMessage([
    { type: 'background_task', taskId: 't1', taskType: 'bash', command: 'npm test', status: 'running', startedAt: now - 2000 },
  ])];

  const { result } = renderHook(() => useBackgroundTasks(messages));
  expect(result.current).toHaveLength(0);

  vi.advanceTimersByTime(4000);
  // After 4s total (2s initial + 4s advanced = 6s), task should appear
  // Need to trigger re-render via the 1s interval
  expect(result.current).toHaveLength(1);
  vi.useRealTimers();
});
```

### 3. Update `tagged-dedup.test.ts`

Update any references to `SubagentPart` or `type: 'subagent'` in `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/tagged-dedup.test.ts`. Replace with `BackgroundTaskPart` and `type: 'background_task'`.

### 4. Delete old test files

- Delete `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/__tests__/RunningAgentIndicator.test.tsx`
- Delete `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/use-running-subagents.test.ts`

## Acceptance Criteria
- `BackgroundTaskBar.test.tsx` passes with tests covering: empty state, agent tasks, bash tasks, mixed tasks, expand toggle, onStopTask callback
- `use-background-tasks.test.ts` passes with tests covering: color assignment, celebration window, status transitions, bash 5s threshold filtering, agent immediate visibility, stopped status handling
- `tagged-dedup.test.ts` passes with updated type references
- Old test files are deleted
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes across the entire monorepo
tasks.activeForm: Migrating RunningAgentIndicator and useRunningSubagents tests

tasks.subject: background-task-visibility [P6] Fix existing tests broken by SubagentPart removal
tasks.description:
After the schema migration, several existing test files will fail because they reference `SubagentPart`, `subagent_started`, `RunningAgent`, or `RunningAgentIndicator`. This task fixes all broken tests across the monorepo.

## Implementation

Run `pnpm test -- --run` and fix all failing tests. Common patterns:

### 1. Tests referencing `SubagentPart` mock data

Replace mock parts like:
```typescript
// Old:
{ type: 'subagent', taskId: 't1', description: 'Test', status: 'running' }

// New:
{ type: 'background_task', taskId: 't1', taskType: 'agent', description: 'Test', status: 'running', startedAt: Date.now() }
```

### 2. Tests referencing stream event types

Replace:
```typescript
// Old:
{ type: 'subagent_started', data: { taskId: 't1', ... } }

// New:
{ type: 'background_task_started', data: { taskId: 't1', taskType: 'agent', startedAt: Date.now(), ... } }
```

### 3. ChatPanel and ChatInputContainer tests

Update:
- Props from `runningAgents` to `backgroundTasks` + `onStopTask`
- Component names from `RunningAgentIndicator` to `BackgroundTaskBar`
- Type imports from `RunningAgent` to `VisibleTask`

Files likely affected:
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatInputContainer.test.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/ChatPanel.test.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/__tests__/use-chat-session-core.test.tsx`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/model/__tests__/chat-retry.test.ts`
- `apps/client/src/layers/features/chat/ui/__tests__/SubagentBlock.test.tsx`
- `apps/server/src/services/runtimes/claude-code/__tests__/sdk-event-mapper.test.ts` (if it exists)
- `packages/test-utils/` (FakeAgentRuntime, createMockTransport)

### 4. FakeAgentRuntime in test-utils

Ensure `stopTask` is added as a spy:
```typescript
stopTask = vi.fn().mockResolvedValue(true);
```

### 5. createMockTransport in test-utils

Ensure `stopTask` is added as a mock:
```typescript
stopTask: vi.fn().mockResolvedValue({ success: true, taskId: 'mock' }),
```

## Acceptance Criteria
- `pnpm test -- --run` passes with zero failures across the entire monorepo
- All mock data uses `BackgroundTaskPart` shape (`type: 'background_task'`)
- All stream event mocks use `background_task_*` event types
- `FakeAgentRuntime` and `createMockTransport` include `stopTask`
- No test file references `SubagentPart`, `RunningAgent`, `RunningAgentIndicator`, or `useRunningSubagents`
tasks.activeForm: Fixing existing tests broken by SubagentPart removal

tasks.subject: background-task-visibility [P7] Create ADR for generic background task system decision
tasks.description:
Create an Architecture Decision Record documenting the decision to replace the subagent-specific system with a generic background task system.

## Implementation

Create `decisions/NNNN-generic-background-task-system.md` (use the next available ADR number from `decisions/manifest.json`).

The ADR should document:

### Context
- The existing system only tracked background subagents (agent tasks)
- The Claude Code SDK now also emits events for background bash commands
- The UI needed to surface both types of background work

### Decision
- Replace `SubagentPart` with `BackgroundTask` — a generic, extensible type with a `taskType` discriminator
- Replace `subagent_*` SSE events with `background_task_*` events
- Add `stopTask` to `AgentRuntime` and `Transport` interfaces
- Big-bang migration (no deprecation period) since all consumers are internal

### Consequences
- Positive: Extensible to future task types without schema changes
- Positive: Unified UI treatment reduces cognitive load
- Positive: `stopTask` is runtime-agnostic — future runtimes implement their own stop mechanism
- Negative: JSONL backward compatibility code required to read old transcripts
- Negative: All existing subagent tests needed migration

Also update `decisions/manifest.json` to include the new ADR.

Also update `contributing/api-reference.md` to document the new `POST /api/sessions/:id/tasks/:taskId/stop` endpoint.

## Acceptance Criteria
- ADR exists in `decisions/` with correct frontmatter and status
- `decisions/manifest.json` includes the new entry
- `contributing/api-reference.md` documents the stopTask endpoint
- The ADR follows the existing ADR format in the repository
tasks.activeForm: Creating ADR for generic background task system decision
